system.powerDescription: This power does NOT cost a psyche burst to use. Imprint your psychic signature onto the soul of another willing exorcist. Select one of your blasphemy powers or sin marks. You grant an ally in range your selected option for the duration of the scene. If granting a blasphemy power you also temporarily grant any passive required for the power to function to your targets. For palaces and bound sins, you share your own palace or bound sin instead of generating entirely new ones. You may choose to grant an additional choice of blasphemy power or sin mark by gaining 1 sin, up to a max of 2 times.
